steps.instruction: Ensure the Branch TestBed app is open on its main screen. If you see buttons like 'Create Branch Link', 'Share Branch Link', 'Send Lifecycle Event', you are already on the main screen. If you are on a different screen (e.g. a log screen, a dialog, or any other app), press Back repeatedly until you reach the main screen, or go to the device home screen, then find and open the 'Branch-SDK-TestBed' app.
Scroll down until the button 'Send Lifecycle Event' is visible on the screen.
Tap on the button that says exactly 'Send Lifecycle Event'. Do not tap on any other button. After tapping, wait 3 seconds for the event to be processed.
Scroll down until the button 'Load Branch Logs' is visible on the screen, then tap on it.

A new screen with log content should appear. Wait up to 5 seconds for the text to load. Look for any text containing 'Lifecycle Event sent successfully' or 'COMPLETE_REGISTRATION' in the log output. If you find it, the test succeeds. If the log screen is empty or shows no relevant lifecycle event entries, the test fails.
